title: TUI Responsiveness
objective: Verify OpenClaw's terminal UI can attach to a running gateway, render a connected screen promptly, and shut down cleanly.

phases.title: Gateway Start
phases.intent: Start the gateway and confirm it is healthy before opening TUI.

phases.title: TUI Attach Smoke
phases.intent: Spawn the real TUI, wait for a recognizable connected screen, then interrupt it cleanly.

phases.title: Post-TUI Health
phases.intent: Verify the gateway remains responsive after a terminal UI session starts and exits.
